# SEO Skill

## Auto-Load When

- creating or editing pages, blogs, landing pages, metadata, sitemaps, or schema

## Rules

- each route gets unique title and description
- match metadata promise to on-page content
- include one clear primary intent per page
- use descriptive heading hierarchy
- add schema only when content supports it
- keep canonical behavior deterministic

## Checklist

- unique title
- unique meta description
- clear H1
- crawlable internal links
- schema candidates identified
- OG text aligned with route intent

## Best Practices

- prioritize click-worthiness over keyword stuffing
- answer the main query above the fold when possible
- use FAQ or comparison blocks only when useful
